name: Know Where to Hide - Wie niet weg is…
original_name: Know Where to Hide - Wie niet weg is…
overview: Led by presenter Stefan Jurriens, participants are challenged to find the ultimate hiding spot and hide for 90 minutes in some of the most iconic and striking locations in the Netherlands, such as Soestdijk Palace, Euroborg Groningen, Walibi Holland, Hof van Saksen, Archeon and Twenthe Airport.

trailers.title: Know Where to Hide: Wie niet weg is… | Officiële Trailer | Prime Video NL
